events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The user wants raw JSON output matching a schema. I need to assess pipe bedding & backfill where lifts are too thick for the compactor. This is a fail because it doesn't meet compaction specs. Need to fill JSON fields.

Decision: fail (non-compliant). Risk: high or medium. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80. Value: 0 (no numeric reading asked but measurable cue estimated). Confidence: 0.85. Findings: lifts exceed max lift thickness per specs/IPC 306, compactor cannot achieve required compaction density. Actions: scarify/remove backfill and recompact in proper lifts per spec. Rationale: lifts too thick prevent adequate compaction, leading to settlement/pipe support failure. References: project specs, IPC 306.

Ensure valid JSON no markdown.
